snippet: Core Index Stages 1–3 provides funding to specialist schools for eligible and approved enrolments based on a student's age range. The following school/campus types receive the Core Index funding at school level: The following campuses/schools do not receive this allocation: Funding is calculated at the Indicative and Confirmed budget cycles. Funding is allocated through credit and cash funding. Core Index allocations are determined based on census student enrolment details.
